Topic Alias Maximum: highest value that the Client will accept as a Topic Alias
Topic Alias Maximum value indicates the highest value that the Client will accept as a Topic Alias

Content Type: UTF-8 Encoded String describing the content of the Will Message

Message Expiry Interval: lifetime of the Will Message in seconds

Maximum Packet Size: Maximum Packet Size the Server is willing to accept

Request Response Information: Request Response Information with a value 1

Response Topic: Topic Name for a response message
Response Topic as the Topic Name

Message Expiry Interval: Four Byte Integer representing the Message Expiry Interval
received value minus the time that the Application Message has been waiting in the Server

Payload Format Indicator: Payload is UTF-8 Encoded Character Data

Packet Identifier: Packet Identifier from the PUBLISH packet that is being acknowledged
Packet Identifier from the PUBLISH packet
Packet Identifier from the PUBREC packet that is being acknowledged
Packet Identifier from the PUBREL packet that is being acknowledged
Packet Identifier from the SUBSCRIBE Packet

Unspecified error: Server does not wish to reveal the reason for the failure
none of the other Reason Codes apply
Malformed Packet: Data within the CONNECT packet could not be correctly parsed
Protocol Error: Data in the CONNECT packet does not conform to this specification
Implementation specific error: CONNECT is valid but is not accepted by this Server
Unsupported Protocol Version: Server does not support the version of the MQTT protocol requested by the Client
Client Identifier not valid: Client Identifier is a valid string but is not allowed by the Server
Bad User Name or Password: Server does not accept the User Name or Password specified by the Client
Not authorized: Client is not authorized to connect
Server busy: Server is busy. Try again later
Banned: Client has been banned by administrative action
Bad authentication method: authentication method is not supported or does not match the authentication method currently in use
Topic Name invalid: Will Topic Name is not malformed, but is not accepted by this Server
Packet too large: CONNECT packet exceeded the maximum permissible size
Quota exceeded: implementation or administrative imposed limit has been exceeded
Payload format invalid: Will Payload does not match the specified Payload Format Indicator
Retain not supported: Server does not support retained messages, and Will Retain was set to 1
QoS not supported: Server does not support the QoS set in Will QoS
Use another server: Client should temporarily use another server
Server moved: Client should permanently use another server
Connection rate exceeded: connection rate limit has been exceeded
